objective: Map every documented trstctl backend capability to an explicit GUI surface, workflow, status panel, or deliberate non-GUI disclosure.

items.current_frontend_mapping: basic: Certificates and Dashboard show inventory rows/counts; coverage ledger: /coverage
items.target_gui_mapping: Production inventory table with filters, pagination, owner/issuer links, expiry bands, source labels, ingest affordance, and empty-state guidance.
items.acceptance_test: Vitest covers list/filter/empty/error/rate-limit states and an e2e screenshot proves certificate inventory renders from served API data.
items.notes: Closed by /coverage feature-map hub. Test evidence: web/src/__tests__/feature_coverage.test.tsx renders all 78 backlog rows, all 16 domains, non-certificate disclosure rows, and focused search; web/src/__tests__/auth_and_dashboards.test.tsx proves dev preview can reach /coverage without token storage. Verification evidence: npm --prefix web run typecheck, npm --prefix web run test, npm --prefix web run build, and git diff --check passed after implementation.
